calendar.matters:
Petition Under Probate Code 17200 For Determination Of Beneficiaries Of Trust And For Order For Distribution Of Trust Funds In Blocked Account And Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Under Probate Code 17200 For Determination Of Beneficiaries Of Trust And For Order For Distribution Of Trust Funds In Blocked Account And Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Continued To Feb-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with Steven L. Williams (Petitioner/Temporary Trustee).

Mr. Taylor stated that the evidence is mostly documents, that they will have three witnesses, that Steven O. Williams has been served in Japan and that the evidentiary hearing can be done in one half day. The Petition for Determination of Trust Beneficiaries was continued to February 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an evidentiary hearing. Notice of the evidentiary hearing is to be given to Stephen O. Williams. Witness lists and exhibit lists are to be filed one week prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy K. Saephan. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Granting Fees For Attorney For Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with Steven Williams.

The Court stated that it has no legal basis to issue the requested order without having the Trust instrument. Mr. Taylor raised the issue of having William O. disinherited, stated that they have evidence of fraud and financial elder abuse, and referred to Probate Code 259(a). The Petition for Attorney Fees was taken under submission. The Petition for Determination of Beneficiaries of Trust, etc. was continued to October 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to amend the petition for 259 relief.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

Petition Under Probate Code 17200 For Determination Of Beneficiaries Of Trust And For Order For Distribution Of Trust Funds In Blocked Account And Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Continued To Oct-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Granting Fees For Attorney For Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Continued To Sep-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with Steven L. Williams. Patrice Craig in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it has no problem with taking fees under submission but that it is not sure how to proceed as to Steven O. Williams. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Steven O. forfeiting his rights and Steven L. being the sole Beneficiary. The Petition for Order Granting Fees for Attorney and the Petition for Determination of Beneficiaries of Trust, etc. were continued to September 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a supplement as to whether the Trustor had any Daughters and setting forth all of the Trustor's heirs at law.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Account, To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, For Relief Under Probate Code 17200 Et Seq., And For Relief Under Probate Code
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with Steven Williams.

The Court stated that its tentative is that the property is in the Juanita Trust, to supend Steven O. Williams as Trustee, to appoint Steven L. Williams as temporary Successor Trustee, to not make any additional order to distribute funds and to place the funds (sale proceeds) into a blocked account. Mr. Taylor stated that the Title Company would like the order to read that "Steven L. Williams has authority to receive information on Cal-Western Reconveyance, LLC loan No. XXX5750, T.S. No. 1387783-31". Mr. Taylor provided a revised order. The Court granted (in part) the Petition for Account, etc. (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for May 19, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Helen Yune-Trowbridge. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Leonardini. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Account, To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, For Relief Under Probate Code 17200 Et Seq., And For Relief Under Probate Code
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Continued To May-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with Steven Williams.

Mr. Taylor stated that the Trustee of Juanita's Trust would be Steven's Father who is now in Japan, that the title company will not give title insurance without the Court's stamp of approval and that they do not have Juanita's Trust. Mr. Taylor also expressed concern about the notice of default, stated that the 90-day period ends May 26, 2014 and that there could be a sale of the property by the first week of June. The Petition for Account, to Remove Trustee, to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. was continued to May 12, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amended petition and for an ex parte petition to waive notice.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
